title: Trail Running Shoes Pro
description: Lightweight trail running shoes with a multi-directional grippy outsole. Designed for mountain terrain and technical trails. Breathable mesh upper keeps feet cool on long runs.

title: Men's Training Shorts
description: 4-inch inseam training shorts built for high-intensity workouts. Moisture-wicking fabric pulls sweat away from skin. Elastic waistband with internal drawstring for a secure fit.

title: Windbreaker Running Jacket
description: Packable windbreaker jacket for outdoor running in variable weather. Water-resistant coating repels light rain. Reflective details for low-light visibility. Packs into its own chest pocket.
